news.t: NYSE Content Update: Global X NYSE 100 ETF to Begin Trading Today
NYSE Lists Global X NYSE® 100 ETF, Expanding Access to Tech-Enabled Growth Companies
Global X Launches NYSE® 100 ETF Tracking Top Technology and Tech-Enabled Growth Companies

holdings.infoBox: NYSX is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.98%, Apple at 8.15%, Microsoft at 5.20%, Micron Technology at 4.59%, and Amazon.com at 4.34%.

overview.description: The Global X NYSE 100 ETF (NYSX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYSE 100 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index that provides exposure to US-listed technology and tech-enabled growth companies across multiple sectors.The fund ranks and selects the top 100 companies based on a combined fundamental and technical factor. NYSX was launched on Mar 25, 2026 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: NYSE Lists Global X NYSE® 100 ETF, Expanding Access to Tech-Enabled Growth Companies
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The NYSE listed the Global X NYSE® 100 ETF (NYSX), allowing investors to participate in the performance of the NYSE 100 Index.
